entries.title: v4.9.0 — Public launch
entries.body:
Photogen is live at photogen.ashbi.ca. The first public version of Creative Studio's product photo generator.

What's in the box

  • BYOK (bring your own Gemini key) with shared-key fallback
  • 5 scene types: In-hand, Studio, Action, Lifestyle, With-props
  • 6 aspect ratios: 1:1, 4:5, 9:16, 16:9, 2:3, 4:3
  • 4-tier quality: Fast, Balanced, Quality, Ultra ($0.02 / $0.045 / $0.09 / $0.24)
  • Composite pipeline: product photo is composited into a generated scene, no hallucinated packaging
  • Real-time cost tracking at /status
  • REST API at /docs

Try it

Open the editor with a product photo and a prompt. No signup needed for the first generation.

entries.title: Landing page revamp
entries.body:
Replaced the broken sample-image gallery with a 4-card try-a-prompt grid. Each card opens the editor with the scene pre-loaded, the aspect ratio locked, and a starter prompt in the textarea.

Touch targets fixed across the site: footer links, API key button, back-link rows on /history, /docs, /status are all ≥32px on mobile.

entries.title: Mobile audit + class-name drift fix
entries.body:
Full mobile pass at 375px. Caught a systemic CSS/template class-name drift that left the pricing section, footer, hero stats, and several other sections unstyled on every viewport. All aliased to match the template.

Fixed a TDZ bug in applyUrlParams() that was breaking the deeplink from the landing gallery cards.
